Usage:
  circleci runner resource-class delete <namespace>/<name> [flags]

Examples:
# Delete a resource class (with confirmation prompt)
$ circleci runner resource-class delete my-org/my-runner

# Delete without confirmation
$ circleci runner resource-class delete my-org/my-runner --force

# Delete in a script
$ circleci runner resource-class delete my-org/my-runner --force


Flags:
  -f, --force   skip confirmation prompt

Global Flags:
  -q, --quiet   suppress informational output; data on stdout is unaffected
